task: Browse the list of Civil Division forms.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated from justice.gov to the DOJ search results for “Civil Division forms,” opened the result titled “Civil Division | Documents and Forms,” and reached the correct page at https://www.justice.gov/civil/documents-and-forms-0. The page snapshot clearly shows the list of Civil Division forms/documents and sections, satisfying the request to browse the list of Civil Division forms.
final_result_response:
I found the DOJ Civil Division “Documents and Forms” page:

https://www.justice.gov/civil/documents-and-forms-0

Main sections listed there:

- Civil Division Enforcement Priorities
- Commercial Litigation Documents & Forms
- Enforcement & Affirmative Litigation Branch Documents & Forms
- Office of Immigration Litigation Documents & Forms
- Torts Branch Documents & Forms

Notable forms/documents on the page include:

- Standard Form 95
- FMS 194: Judgment Fund Transmittal
- FMS 196: Judgment Fund Award Data Sheet
- FMS 197: Judgment Fund Voucher for Payment
- Appendix A: Attestation Form
- RECA claim forms:
  - Onsite Participant Claim Form
  - Downwinder Claim Form
  - Uranium Mine Employee Claim Form
  - Ore Transporter Claim Form
  - Uranium Mill Employee Claim Form
- Annuity Broker Declaration
action_history: Opening Justice.gov: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.justice.gov/');
Searching DOJ for Civil Division forms: await page.locator('e9').fill('Civil Division forms');
Searching DOJ for Civil Division forms: await page.locator('e10').click();
Opening Civil Division documents and forms: await page.locator('e18').click();
